title: REMnux
html:
Stub. The malware-analysis Linux distro Yahir ran IDA Pro inside for the spring-2025 CS reverse-engineering homework. The May-2025 busybox disassembly screenshots all show the remnux@remnux:~/idapro-9.0 prompt. Likely the same VM as the malware analysis lab referenced elsewhere.

Related

  • ida pro · busybox · malware analysis lab · cs coursework
